notice.displayName: This node connects to the Microsoft 365 cloud platform. Use the 'Extract from File' and 'Convert to File' nodes to directly manipulate spreadsheet files (.xls, .csv, etc). More info.

workbook.description: A workbook is the top level object which contains one or more worksheets

worksheet.description: A sheet is a grid of cells which can contain data, tables, charts, etc

convertToRange.description: Convert a table to a range

addTable.description: Add a table based on range

getColumns.description: Retrieve a list of table columns

getRows.description: Retrieve a list of table rows

lookup.description: Look for rows that match a given value in a column

addWorksheet.description: Add a new sheet to the workbook

upsert.description: Append a new row or update the current one if it already exists (upsert)

readRows.description: Retrieve a list of sheet rows

update.description: Update rows of a sheet or sheet range

autoMap.description: Use when node input properties match destination column names

define.description: Set the value for each destination column

raw.description: Send raw data as JSON, the whole selected range would be updated with the new values

data.description: Raw values for the specified range as array of string arrays in JSON format. Should match the specified range: one array item for each row.

column.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression
Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

index.description: Specifies the relative position of the new row. If not defined, the addition happens at the end. Any row below the inserted row will be shifted downwards. First row index is 0.

rawData.description: Whether the data should be returned RAW instead of parsed into keys according to their header

dataProperty.description: The name of the property into which to write the RAW data

returnAllMatches.description: By default only the first result gets returned. If options gets set all found matches get returned.

fields.description: Fields the response will containt. Multiple can be added separated by ,.

updateAll.description: Whether to update all matching rows or just the first match

appendAfterSelectedRange.description: Whether to append data after the selected range or used range

auto.description: The whole used range on the selected sheet will be converted into a table

manual.description: Select a range that will be converted into a table

range.description: The sheet range to read the data from specified using a A1-style notation, has to be specific e.g A1:B5, generic ranges like A:B are not supported. Leave blank to use whole used range in the sheet.

hasHeaders.description: Whether the range has column labels. When this property set to false Excel will automatically generate header shifting the data down by one row.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

rawData.description: Whether the data should be returned RAW instead of parsed into keys according to their header

dataProperty.description: The name of the property into which to write the RAW data

fields.description: A comma-separated list of the fields to include in the response

column.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

lookupColumn.description: The name of the column in which to look for value

lookupValue.description: The value to look for in column

name.description: The name of the sheet to be added. The name should be unique. If not specified, Excel will determine the name of the new worksheet.

All.description: Clear data in cells and remove all formatting

Formats.description: Clear formatting(e.g. font size, color) of cells

keyRow.description: Relative to selected 'Range', first row index is 0

dataStartRow.description: Relative to selected 'Range', first row index is 0

columnToMatchOn.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

valueToMatchOn.displayName: Value of Column to Match On
